name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, flag, turn

Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ flag = [p \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \E p \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = p
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "trying"]
          /\ \A q \in 1..N : q # p => flag[q] = FALSE
          /\ \A q \in 1..N : q # p => turn[q] # p
          /\ \A q \in 1..N : q # p => state[q] # "critical"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "critical"]
          \/ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![p] = FALSE]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<turn>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, flag, turn>>

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ turn \in 1..N

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommitProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, participants, coordinator
VARIABLES coordinator, participants


vars == <<participants, coordinator>>

TypeOK == /\ participants \subseteq 1..N
          /\ coordinator \in 1..N
          /\ participants # {coordinator}

Init == /\ participants = 1..N
        /\ coordinator = 1

Prepare == /\ coordinator' = coordinator
          /\ participants' = participants

VoteYes == /\ coordinator' = coordinator
          /\ participants' = participants

VoteNo == /\ coordinator' = coordinator
          /\ participants' = participants

Commit == /\ coordinator' = coordinator
          /\ participants' = participants

Abort == /\ coordinator' = coordinator
          /\ participants' = participants

Next == \/ Prepare
        \/ VoteYes
        \/ VoteNo
        \/ Commit
        \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

\* State of each philosopher: "thinking", "hungry", or "eating"
VARIABLES philosophers, forks

Init == /\ philosophers = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]
        /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> TRUE]  \* TRUE means fork i is free

\* Helper to get left and right fork indices for philosopher i
leftFork(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
rightFork(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

\* Action: philosopher i becomes hungry
Hungry(i) == /\ philosophers[i] = "thinking"
            /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
            /\ UNCHANGED forks

\* Action: philosopher i picks up forks if both are free
PickUp(i) == /\ philosophers[i] = "hungry"
            /\ forks[leftFork(i)] /\ forks[rightFork(i)]
            /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
            /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![leftFork(i)] = FALSE,
                                      ![rightFork(i)] = FALSE]
            /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

\* Action: philosopher i puts down forks
PutDown(i) == /\ philosophers[i] = "eating"
             /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
             /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![leftFork(i)] = TRUE,
                                      ![rightFork(i)] = TRUE]
             /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

\* Next-state relation: any philosopher can become hungry, pick up forks if possible, or put down forks
Next == \E i \in 1..N:
          (Hungry(i) \/ PickUp(i) \/ PutDown(i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<philosophers, forks>>

\* Type correctness invariant
TypeOK == /\ philosophers \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
          /\ forks \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

\* Safety property: no two adjacent philosophers are eating simultaneously
Safety == \A i \in 1..N:
            philosophers[i] # "eating" \/ philosophers[rightFork(i)] # "eating"

\* Liveness property: every hungry philosopher eventually starts eating
Liveness == \A i \in 1..N:
              []<>(philosophers[i] = "eating")

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N
VARIABLES flag, num


vars == <<num, flag>>

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 0]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

vars == <<q, head, tail, size>>

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

ProducerAction == /\ size < K
                 /\ q[tail] = 0
                 /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]
                 /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
                 /\ size' = size + 1
                 /\ head' = head

ConsumerAction == /\ size > 0
                 /\ q[head] = 1
                 /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
                 /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
                 /\ size' = size - 1
                 /\ tail' = tail

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ size \in 0..K
          /\ q \in [1..K -> {0,1}]

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, majority, NULL

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

(* State can be "Follower", "Candidate", or "Leader" *)

Init == 
    /\ currentTerm = 0
    /\ votedFor = [i \in 1..N |-> NULL]
    /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "Follower"]

(* A server can start an election by becoming a candidate and incrementing its term *)
StartElection == 
    /\ state[i] = "Follower"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Candidate"]
    /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
    /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![i] = i]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

(* A server can receive a vote request from a candidate *)
ReceiveVoteRequest == 
    /\ state[i] = "Follower"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Follower"]
    /\ currentTerm' = MAX(currentTerm, term)
    /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![i] = candidateId]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

(* A server can receive a vote from a candidate *)
ReceiveVote == 
    /\ state[i] = "Candidate"
    /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
    /\ votedFor' = votedFor
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Leader"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

Next == 
    \E i \in 1..N : 
        \E term, candidateId \in 0..N : 
            \E vote \in {TRUE, FALSE} : 
                \E state \in {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"} : 
                    /\ state[i] = state
                    /\ term = currentTerm
                    /\ candidateId = i
                    /\ vote = votedFor[i] = i
                    /\ state' = state
                    /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
                    /\ votedFor' = votedFor
                    /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

TypeOK == 
    /\ currentTerm \in Nat
    /\ votedFor \in [1..N -> {NULL} \cup 1..N]
    /\ state \in [1..N -> {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}]

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == 
  /\ readers = {}
  /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == 
  \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
     /\ \E r \in readers : /\ r \in readers
                            /\ readers' = readers \ {r}
                            /\ writer_active' = writer_active
  \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
     /\ \E r \in readers : /\ r \in readers
                            /\ readers' = readers \ {r}
                            /\ writer_active' = TRUE
  \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
     /\ \E r \in readers : /\ r \in readers
                            /\ readers' = readers
                            /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

TypeOK == 
  /\ readers \subseteq Nat
  /\ writer_active \in BOOLEAN

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Msg
VARIABLES messages, token


vars == <<token, messages>>

Init == /\ token = 1
        /\ messages = [i \in 1..N |-> {}]

Next == /\ token' = %(token, N) + 1
        /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![token] = messages[token] \cup {%(token, N) + 1}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ token \in 1..N
          /\ messages \in [1..N -> SUBSET 1..N]
          /\ \A i \in 1..N: ~(token \in messages[i])
          /\ \A i \in 1..N: token \in messages[i] => messages[i] = {token}
          /\ \A i \in 1..N: ~(token \in messages[i] => messages[i] = {})

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KVStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, ClientId

VARIABLES store, clients, pending

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
          /\ clients \in [ClientId -> [op -> {"Put", "Get"}, key -> Keys, value -> Values]]
          /\ pending \in [ClientId -> {"Put", "Get", "Done"}]

Init == /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> 0]
        /\ clients = [c \in ClientId |-> [op -> "Done", key -> 0, value -> 0]]
        /\ pending = [c \in ClientId |-> "Done"]

Next == \/ /\ \E c \in ClientId: /\ clients' = [clients EXCEPT ![c] = [op -> "Put", key -> k, value -> v]]
                           /\ pending' = [pending EXCEPT ![c] = "Put"]
                           /\ UNCHANGED <<store, clients>>
          \/ /\ \E c \in ClientId: /\ clients' = [clients EXCEPT ![c] = [op -> "Get", key -> k, value -> v]]
                           /\ pending' = [pending EXCEPT ![c] = "Get"]
                           /\ UNCHANGED <<store, clients>>
          \/ /\ \E c \in ClientId: /\ pending' = [pending EXCEPT ![c] = "Done"]
                           /\ clients' = [clients EXCEPT ![c] = [op -> "Done", key -> 0, value -> 0]]
                           /\ IF pending[c] = "Put" THEN store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
                           /\ IF pending[c] = "Get" THEN store' = store /\ clients' = [clients EXCEPT ![c] = [op -> "Done", key -> 0, value -> store[k]]]
                           /\ UNCHANGED <<store, clients>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store, clients, pending>>

====

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V, Ballot, Value

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen, chosenBallot, chosenValue, maxBallot, promisedBallot

vars == <<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

Init == 
    /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [maxBallot -> 0, promisedBallot -> 0, chosenBallot -> 0, chosenValue -> NULL]]
    /\ proposers = [i \in 1..M |-> [maxBallot -> 0, promisedBallot -> 0, chosenBallot -> 0, chosenValue -> NULL]]
    /\ chosen = <<>> 

TypeOK == 
    /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [maxBallot -> Nat, promisedBallot -> Nat, chosenBallot -> Nat, chosenValue -> V \cup {NULL}]]
    /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [maxBallot -> Nat, promisedBallot -> Nat, chosenBallot -> Nat, chosenValue -> V \cup {NULL}]]
    /\ chosen \in Seq(V)

Prepare(i, v) == 
    /\ proposers[i].maxBallot' = proposers[i].maxBallot + 1
    /\ proposers[i].promisedBallot' = proposers[i].maxBallot'
    /\ proposers[i].chosenBallot' = proposers[i].chosenBallot
    /\ proposers[i].chosenValue' = proposers[i].chosenValue
    /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![i] = [!i, promisedBallot -> proposers[i].maxBallot']]

Promise(i, v) == 
    /\ proposers[i].maxBallot' = proposers[i].maxBallot
    /\ proposers[i].promisedBallot' = proposers[i].promisedBallot
    /\ proposers[i].chosenBallot' = proposers[i].chosenBallot
    /\ proposers[i].chosenValue' = proposers[i].chosenValue
    /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![i] = [!i, promisedBallot -> proposers[i].maxBallot]]

Accept(i, v) == 
    /\ proposers[i].maxBallot' = proposers[i].maxBallot
    /\ proposers[i].promisedBallot' = proposers[i].promisedBallot
    /\ proposers[i].chosenBallot' = proposers[i].chosenBallot
    /\ proposers[i].chosenValue' = proposers[i].chosenValue
    /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![i] = [!i, chosenBallot -> proposers[i].maxBallot, chosenValue -> v]]

Accepted(i, v) == 
    /\ proposers[i].maxBallot' = proposers[i].maxBallot
    /\ proposers[i].promisedBallot' = proposers[i].promisedBallot
    /\ proposers[i].chosenBallot' = proposers[i].chosenBallot
    /\ proposers[i].chosenValue' = proposers[i].chosenValue
    /\ acceptors' = acceptors

Choose(i, v) == 
    /\ proposers[i].maxBallot' = proposers[i].maxBallot
    /\ proposers[i].promisedBallot' = proposers[i].promisedBallot
    /\ proposers[i].chosenBallot' = proposers[i].chosenBallot
    /\ proposers[i].chosenValue' = v
    /\ acceptors' = acceptors

Chosen(v) == 
    /\ chosen' = Append(chosen, v)
    /\ acceptors' = acceptors
    /\ proposers' = proposers

Next == 
    /\ \E i \in 1..M : \E v \in V :
        /\ proposers[i].maxBallot' = proposers[i].maxBallot
        /\ proposers[i].promisedBallot' = proposers[i].promisedBallot
        /\ proposers[i].chosenBallot' = proposers[i].chosenBallot
        /\ proposers[i].chosenValue' = proposers[i].chosenValue
        /\ acceptors' = acceptors
        /\ chosen' = chosen
        /\ \E j \in 1..N: Prepare(i, v)
    \/ \E i \in 1..M : \E v \in V :
        /\ proposers[i].maxBallot' = proposers[i].maxBallot
        /\ proposers[i].promisedBallot' = proposers[i].promisedBallot
        /\ proposers[i].chosenBallot' = proposers[i].chosenBallot
        /\ proposers[i].chosenValue' = proposers[i].chosenValue
        /\ acceptors' = acceptors
        /\ chosen' = chosen
        /\ \E j \in 1..N: Promise(i, v)
    \/ \E i \in 1..M : \E v \in V :
        /\ proposers[i].maxBallot' = proposers[i].maxBallot
        /\ proposers[i].promisedBallot' = proposers[i].promisedBallot
        /\ proposers[i].chosenBallot' = proposers[i].chosenBallot
        /\ proposers[i].chosenValue' = proposers[i].chosenValue
        /\ acceptors' = acceptors
        /\ chosen' = chosen
        /\ \E j \in 1..N: Accept(i, v)
    \/ \E i \in 1..M : \E v \in V :
        /\ proposers[i].maxBallot' = proposers[i].maxBallot
        /\ proposers[i].promisedBallot' = proposers[i].promisedBallot
        /\ proposers[i].chosenBallot' = proposers[i].chosenBallot
        /\ proposers[i].chosenValue' = proposers[i].chosenValue
        /\ acceptors' = acceptors
        /\ chosen' = chosen
        /\ \E j \in 1..N: Accepted(i, v)
    \/ \E i \in 1..M : \E v \in V :
        /\ proposers[i].maxBallot' = proposers[i].maxBallot
        /\ proposers[i].promisedBallot' = proposers[i].promisedBallot
        /\ proposers[i].chosenBallot' = proposers[i].chosenBallot
        /\ proposers[i].chosenValue' = proposers[i].chosenValue
        /\ acceptors' = acceptors
        /\ chosen' = chosen
        /\ Choose(i, v)
    \/ \E v \in V:
        /\ proposers' = proposers
        /\ acceptors' = acceptors
        /\ chosen' = chosen
        /\ Chosen(v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Sender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES acked, retransmits, sent, state

    /\ file = Seq(1..FILE_SIZE) \* file is a sequence of bytes
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) |-> 

            SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, i*CHUNK_SIZE)

            SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, FILE_SIZE)]
    /\ sent = {} \* no chunks have been sent yet
    /\ acked = {} \* no chunks have been acknowledged yet
    /\ retransmits = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) |-> 0]
    /\ state = "idle"

Next == 
    /\ state = "idle" => 
        /\ sent' = sent
        /\ acked' = acked
        /\ retransmits' = retransmits
        /\ state' = "sending"
    \/ state = "sending" => 
        /\ \E i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) : 
            /\ i \notin sent
            /\ sent' = sent \cup {i}
            /\ acked' = acked
            /\ retransmits' = retransmits
            /\ state' = "waiting"
        \/ \E i \in acked : 
            /\ sent' = sent
            /\ acked' = acked \ {i}
            /\ retransmits' = retransmits
            /\ state' = "sending"
        \/ \E i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) : 
            /\ i \in sent
            /\ i \notin acked
            /\ retransmits[i] < MAX_RETRIES
            /\ sent' = sent
            /\ acked' = acked
            /\ retransmits' = [retransmits EXCEPT ![i] = retransmits[i] + 1]
            /\ state' = "waiting"
        \/ \E i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) : 
            /\ i \in sent
            /\ i \notin acked
            /\ retransmits[i] = MAX_RETRIES
            /\ sent' = sent
            /\ acked' = acked
            /\ retransmits' = retransmits
            /\ state' = "failed"
    \/ state = "waiting" => 
        /\ \E i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) : 
            /\ i \in sent
            /\ i \notin acked
            /\ retransmits[i] < MAX_RETRIES
            /\ sent' = sent
            /\ acked' = acked \cup {i}
            /\ retransmits' = retransmits
            /\ state' = "sending"
        \/ \E i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) : 
            /\ i \in sent
            /\ i \notin acked
            /\ retransmits[i] = MAX_RETRIES
            /\ sent' = sent
            /\ acked' = acked
            /\ retransmits' = retransmits
            /\ state' = "failed"
    \/ state = "failed" => 
        /\ sent' = sent
        /\ acked' = acked
        /\ retransmits' = retransmits
        /\ state' = "failed"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sent, acked, retransmits, state>>

====
